title: EMERGENCY FOOD ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: JOSEPHINE COUNTY FARM COLLECTIVE EMERGENCY FOOD ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a weekly emergency food box. Options include vegetarian, eggs, meat, and vegetables, and shelf-stable items only. Accepts food donations. 485 Daily Lane Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Food box requests: Sunday 6am-Wednesday 6am Farm stand pick up: November-April Tuesday 3pm-6pm, May-October 4pm-7pm, Wednesday 8am-5pm locations vary Email (503) 304-3754 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 304-3754 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to request food box; additional pickup locations will be available once the online account has been created. Email for information about donating food items. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Wednesday 8am-4pm Services: Food Donation Programs Fresh Food Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - KITCHEN RENTAL FOOD - MARKETPLACE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JOSEPHINE COUNTY FARM COLLECTIVE
